parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining human footage with an AI-generated avatar. The bottom panel features a robot with unnatural, stiff movements and a synthetic voice, characteristic of AI generation. The top panel's human footage appears slightly looped or edited to fit the pacing.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, fair complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair and expressive facial features. She wears large hoop earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A mustard yellow, off-the-shoulder long-sleeve top.
characters.demeanor: Exaggerated and expressive, showing distress from eating spicy food.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot avatar. It has a smooth, glossy white face and torso with visible dark metallic joints at the neck and shoulders. The face has human-like eyes and a mouth but lacks a nose.
characters.wardrobe: None, it is a bare robot chassis.

scenes.setting: Dark studio background, table with hot sauces and fried chicken.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a table against a solid black background. In front of her is a plate of fried chicken and a row of various hot sauce bottles. She holds a piece of fried chicken in one hand and points at it with the other. Her facial expressions are exaggerated, indicating she is eating something very spicy. She occasionally wipes her mouth with a tissue.

Character B, a white humanoid robot, is positioned behind a table against a dark grey background. On the table, there is a row of hot sauce bottles on the left and a plate of fried chicken on the right. The robot faces forward, its mouth moving as if speaking, with stiff, minimal body movements.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a human woman on top and a robot on the bottom. Both are seated at tables with hot sauces and fried chicken. Text overlays appear in the center, translating the woman's Gujarati complaints about the spicy food into English, spoken by the robot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: મારી જીભ બળે છે! [My tongue is burning!]
Character B says: My tongue is burning.
Character A says: આ ખાવાનું બહુ તીખું છે. [This food is very spicy.]
Character B says: This food is very spicy.
Character A says: આમાં બહુ મરચું છે. [It has a lot of chili in it.]
Character B says: It has a lot of chili in it.
Character A says: પાણી આપો, બહુ તીખું છે! [Give me water, it's too spicy!]
Character B says: Give me water, it's too spicy!
Character A says: હું પણ તમારી જેમ fluent English બોલવા માંગુ છું. પણ કેવી રીતે? [I also want to speak fluent English like you. But how?]
Character B says: રોજ 10-15 minute મારી સાથે practice કરો. [Practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily.]
